description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push to any branch and on every pull request. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.9, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 2.7, 3.4, 3.5). For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, use caching for pip and venv, and run a test script specific to the OS.
